# 09 — Plugin Authoring: A Minimal `LanguagePlugin`

Coming soon. This tutorial goes deeper than notebook 06: it walks through
authoring a minimal `LanguagePlugin` for a toy language (Mini-JS),
registering it programmatically against a `PluginRegistry`, and running the
result end-to-end on a three-line snippet.

> **Background:** The `LanguagePlugin` contract and the `parse` /
> `extract_symbols` / `extract_types` / `resolve_imports` abstract methods
> are documented in [api/plugin_api.md](../api/plugin_api.md). The discovery
> and packaging conventions plugins slot into are in
> [rules/overview.md](../rules/overview.md) and
> [rules/custom_rules.md](../rules/custom_rules.md).

See [related docs](../index.md) for now.
